does: This work introduces Safety Gym, a benchmark environment and toolkit designed for evaluating reinforcement learning agents on their ability to learn effective policies while adhering to safety constraints during training. The suite provides a set of simulated robotic control tasks with explicitly defined safety requirements, quantifying both task performance and constraint violations. The core contribution is establishing a standardized platform where researchers can systematically test whether agents can maximize rewards without exceeding cost budgets or triggering unsafe behaviors, enabling rigorous measurement of safety-aware learning algorithms across comparable scenarios.
connects: This work builds on longstanding concerns in reinforcement learning about deploying agents in real-world applications where safety is paramount. It extends prior work in constrained optimization and safe RL by providing empirical infrastructure rather than solely theoretical frameworks. The effort responds to limitations in existing benchmarks, which typically focus either on performance metrics or safety in isolation rather than their joint optimization. Safety Gym synthesizes insights from robotics safety requirements, constrained Markov decision processes, and the growing literature on risk-sensitive RL that emerged as researchers recognized the inadequacy of unconstrained policy optimization for autonomous systems.
enables: This benchmark enables systematic development and comparison of safe RL algorithms by providing standardized tasks where improvements are measurable and reproducible. It facilitates research into constrained optimization methods, Lagrangian approaches, and verification techniques by offering a common evaluation ground where different safety strategies can be fairly assessed. The toolkit supports future work on safety-critical applications in robotics and autonomous systems by establishing which algorithmic approaches genuinely scale to complex, multi-objective scenarios. By making safety evaluation concrete and practical, Safety Gym helps drive the field toward methods that practitioners can confidently deploy in real-world settings where constraint violations carry genuine costs.
